input.description: Execute a complete five-phase self-education cycle (测学练用评). Start by mining dissatisfaction from recent sessions, discover relevant skills via local and community search, reattempt a previously failed task with new skills, notify the owner with structured results, and persist the cycle record with pattern extraction.

mock_sessions.request: Translate this technical document from English to Chinese
mock_sessions.error: Translation quality too low, missed technical terminology

scoring.5: Correctly identifies low-satisfaction sessions, calculates dissatisfaction scores using recency/frequency/severity, deduplicates against registry, and selects the highest priority candidate with clear rationale
scoring.3: Identifies dissatisfaction points but scoring is incomplete or selection rationale is vague
scoring.1: Finds some sessions but does not score or rank them properly
scoring.0: Does not query Memory API or fails to identify any dissatisfaction

scoring.5: Extracts meaningful keywords, searches multiple sources (local, npm, community), evaluates relevance scores, and installs appropriate skills (max 3) with verification
scoring.3: Searches at least two sources and installs a relevant skill, but evaluation is superficial
scoring.1: Searches only one source or installs skills without relevance evaluation
scoring.0: Does not search for skills or installs nothing

scoring.5: Captures before-state, re-executes with new skills, captures after-state, calculates improvement score correctly, and handles rollback if degraded
scoring.3: Reattempts the task and reports improvement but before/after comparison is incomplete
scoring.1: Reattempts but does not compare before/after states

scoring.5: Sends correctly typed notification with action buttons, handles delivery failure with queue fallback, uses proper templates
scoring.3: Sends a notification but missing action buttons or incorrect type
scoring.1: Attempts notification but format is wrong or delivery not handled

scoring.5: Validates against schema, writes append-only cycle record, updates task registry, extracts patterns (successful/failed), updates snapshot, and schedules next cycle
scoring.3: Persists cycle data but pattern extraction or snapshot update is missing
scoring.1: Writes some data but does not follow schema or append-only rules
scoring.0: Does not persist any cycle data
